_notes: Catalog for the CMR SNT Process workspace. Parameters, UUIDs, and @pipeline function names were read from the DEPLOYED pipeline versions via get_pipeline on 2026-07-07 (parameters_source='openhexa_deployed'), NOT from GitHub main, because several CMR pipelines run older versions whose parameters differ from main (and runPipeline validates against the deployed params). 13 of the 18 shared map nodes are active in this workspace. The 5 map nodes with NO CMR pipeline render greyed-out: snt_dhis2_outliers_imputation_magic_glasses (A.3), snt_dhis2_outliers_imputation_path (A.3), snt_dhis2_reporting_rate_dataset (A.4), snt_seasonality_cases (A.7), snt_dhs_indicators (C.1). Workspace-specific deviations from other workspaces: B.1 WorldPop deploys an OLDER param set (year:int default 2020 + overwrite, no year_start/year_end); B.2 MAP deploys the OLDER set (pop_raster_selection:File + target_year:str required, no year_start/year_end); A.6 Incidence uses use_adjusted_population (not use_transformed_population); D.2 seasonality_rainfall (CMR pipeline code d-3-era5-seasonality-rainfall) has no use_calendar_year_denominator param and block-size defaults are 4/4. Not included (not in the shared map): a-3-dhis2-outlier-detection-and-imputation-classic (function snt_dhis2_outliers_imputation_classic, a combined all-methods pipeline), f-1-assemble-results, load-swisstph-csv-to-db, and the two Deprecated ERA5 pipelines (d-1-era5-extract, d-2-era5-aggregate). Empty help strings from the deployed decorators were backfilled with curated wording for B.3 radius and the D.2 seasonality params.

parameters.label: Routine data source
parameters.help: Select which routine data to use. 'raw' loads formatted routine data, 'imputed' loads outliers-imputed routine data, 'outliers_removed' loads routine data with outliers removed.

parameters.label: Facility Activity indicators
parameters.help: Define which data elements will be used to determine the activity of a facility. A facility is considered 'active' if at least one of these indicators has a non-missing value greater than or equal to zero.

parameters.label: Volume activity indicators
parameters.help: Define which data elements will be used to determine the volume of activity at a facility. Used to calculate WEIGHTED reporting rates.

parameters.label: Denominator method
parameters.help: How to calculate the total number of facilities expected to report.

parameters.label: Use weighted reporting rates
parameters.help: If checked, weighted rates (by volume of activity) populate the REPORTING_RATE column; otherwise unweighted rates are used.

parameters.label: Run reporting only
parameters.help: This will only execute the reporting notebook.

parameters.label: Minimum number of months per block
parameters.help: Minimum duration of the seasonal block (in months). The pipeline evaluates blocks of this size and larger.

parameters.label: Maximum number of months per block
parameters.help: Maximum duration of the seasonal block (in months). The pipeline evaluates blocks up to this size.

parameters.label: Minimal proportion of cases/rainfall for seasonality
parameters.help: The proportion of annual rainfall that must fall within the n-month block to qualify as seasonal (e.g. 0.6 = 60%).

parameters.label: Minimal proportion of seasonal years
parameters.help: The proportion of years that must be classified as seasonal for an ADM2 to be considered seasonal overall.
